alcohol.name: Hydroxyl (alcohol)
alcohol.notes: The oxygen is the scaffold-bound atom

ether.name: Ether
ether.notes: Two external groups bind the same oxygen so only map 1 is used

aldehyde.name: Aldehyde
aldehyde.notes: The carbonyl carbon is the scaffold-bound atom

ketone.name: Ketone
ketone.notes: Two external groups bind the same carbonyl carbon so only map 1 is used

carboxylic_acid.name: Carboxylic acid
carboxylic_acid.notes: The acyl carbon is the scaffold-bound atom

ester.name: Ester
ester.notes: Map 1 is the acyl-side binding atom and map 2 is the alkoxy-side binding atom

primary_amide.name: Primary amide
primary_amide.notes: The acyl carbon is the scaffold-bound atom

secondary_amide.name: Secondary amide
secondary_amide.notes: Map 1 is the acyl-side binding atom and map 2 is the nitrogen-side binding atom

primary_amine.name: Primary amine
primary_amine.notes: The nitrogen is the scaffold-bound atom

secondary_amine.name: Secondary amine
secondary_amine.notes: Two external groups bind the same nitrogen so only map 1 is used

imine.name: Imine
imine.notes: Map 1 is the carbon-side binding atom and map 2 is the nitrogen-side binding atom

nitrile.notes: The nitrile carbon is the scaffold-bound atom

nitro.name: Nitro
nitro.notes: The nitrogen is the scaffold-bound atom

thiol.name: Thiol
thiol.notes: The sulfur is the scaffold-bound atom

thioether.name: Thioether
thioether.notes: Two external groups bind the same sulfur so only map 1 is used

sulfoxide.notes: Two external groups bind the same sulfur so only map 1 is used

sulfone.notes: Two external groups bind the same sulfur so only map 1 is used

sulfonamide.name: Sulfonamide
sulfonamide.notes: Map 1 is the sulfur-side binding atom and map 2 is the nitrogen-side binding atom

alkene.name: Alkene
alkene.notes: The two alkene carbons are distinct binding atoms

alkyne.name: Alkyne
alkyne.notes: The two alkyne carbons are distinct binding atoms

phenyl.name: Phenyl

p_phenylene.name: para-Phenylene

carbamate.notes: Map 1 is the oxygen-side binding atom and map 2 is the nitrogen-side binding atom
